bugs.error_message: Null/undefined access in
bugs.root_cause: Property access on potentially null/undefined value
bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)

bugs.error_message: executor deleted untracked skill directory .xtrm/skills/default/find-docs/ during xtrm-glpt implementation
bugs.root_cause: executor ran 'rm -rf .xtrm/skills/default/find-docs' while cleaning up stale active/ symlinks, not realising find-docs was an existing skill (untracked by git, so git checkout could not restore it)
bugs.fix: steered executor to stop; executor recreated find-docs from memory; added steer note to bead to not delete existing skills

bugs.error_message: Significant refactor of
bugs.root_cause: 7 lines replaced/restructured
bugs.fix: Rewrote 11→13 lines (7 removed)

bugs.error_message: Pi startup reported xtrm-ui conflicts with pi-dex for built-in tools and pidex-* themes
bugs.root_cause: Older machines could still load stale npm:pi-dex from Pi settings even though xtrm-ui vendors the same tool renderers/themes and is intended to replace pi-dex.
bugs.fix: Prune npm:pi-dex from user/project Pi settings during xt pi reload/init, remove stale pi-dex from published root pi package metadata, and document the cleanup behavior.

bugs.error_message: xtrm-loader logged 'Injected .xtrm/memory.md ...' during before_agent_start and polluted the Pi TUI user prompt row
bugs.root_cause: before_agent_start emitted an INFO log for routine memory injection on every turn instead of staying silent while mutating the system prompt.
bugs.fix: Removed the per-turn logger.info call while preserving memory.md injection into the system prompt.

bugs.error_message: pi-runtime test 'runs global installs for missing required runtime packages' expected installed packages but got []
bugs.root_cause: Test installRunner mock returned numeric 0, but PiPackageInstallRunner now returns an object with status/stdout/stderr; installPiPackageWithFallback treated numeric return as failed/undefined status.
bugs.fix: Updated the mock to return { status: 0, stdout: '', stderr: '' }.

bugs.error_message: xt update/install preserved a valid-but-stale .xtrm/skills/default symlink instead of replacing it from the current package payload
bugs.root_cause: scaffoldSkillsDefaultFromPackage treated any valid symlink as dev-mode and returned noop, so symlinks to old xtrm-tools package/source paths survived update and registry install copied through or left stale targets unresolved.
bugs.fix: Compare realpath(targetDir) with realpath(packageRoot/.xtrm/skills/default); preserve only current package/dev symlink, otherwise remove stale/broken symlink and copy current package payload. Added regression coverage for stale valid symlink replacement.

bugs.error_message: specialists run failed with SQLite upsertStatus failed: database client unavailable
bugs.root_cause: The specialists observability database file did not exist, so createObservabilitySqliteClient returned null and Supervisor.writeStatusFile threw instead of using job files.
bugs.fix: Initialized .specialists/db/observability.db before dispatching further specialists; subsequent jobs recorded results in SQLite.

bugs.error_message: xtrm-ui compact-tool commands wrote project preference into global ~/.pi/agent/settings.json
bugs.root_cause: writeExternalCompactFlag created a cross-project side effect and initially swallowed write/parse errors while prefs were already persisted in session entries.
bugs.fix: Removed the global compact-flag writer and kept compactExternalToolResults persistence in xtrm-ui session preferences.

bugs.error_message: Backtick command substitution in bd create --description executed xt update/paths while creating bead
bugs.root_cause: Used double-quoted shell argument containing markdown backticks; bash treated backticks as command substitution, accidentally running xt update/xt update --apply and stripping code spans from bead text.
bugs.fix: Immediately reverted unintended tracked .xtrm changes with git checkout and rewrote corrupted bead using single-quoted heredoc. Use --body-file - <<'EOF' for bead descriptions containing backticks or shell snippets.

bugs.error_message: Shell command substitution triggered by backticks inside a double-quoted sp resume message; bash attempted to execute branch names/file paths and failed before resume.
bugs.root_cause: Used double quotes around a long shell argument containing markdown backticks. Bash evaluates backticks even inside double quotes.
bugs.fix: Re-ran sp resume using a single-quoted argument with no backticks. Continue using single quotes or heredoc/temp files for bd/sp text payloads.

bugs.error_message: npm pack --workspace cli temp install crashed on xt --version with 'Failed to locate package root: .xtrm/registry.json not found'
bugs.root_cause: init.ts resolved packageRoot at module import time via resolvePackageRoot(), so importing the CLI loaded init and crashed before --version/--help could run when the workspace-only xtrm-cli package lacks root .xtrm assets.
bugs.fix: Made package-root access lazy in init.ts, resolving only when init actions need package assets; marked cli/package.json private to document workspace package as nonpublishable; rebuilt dist and smoke-tested workspace/root tarballs.

bugs.error_message: pre-commit pre-push OSV diff gate reported all existing vulnerabilities as new
bugs.root_cause: OSV JSON source paths from the archived baseline tree were normalized relative to the live repo cwd, so identical lockfile findings had different source keys and compared as newly introduced.
bugs.fix: Pass current and baseline scan roots into the JSON comparison and normalize each absolute source path relative to its own root before diffing vulnerability keys.

bugs.error_message: pre-commit run --hook-stage pre-push --all-files modified hundreds of unrelated tracked files
bugs.root_cause: Commit-stage formatting hooks inherited default_stages and still ran during the pre-push all-files validation, so trailing-whitespace/end-of-file-fixer touched the whole dirty worktree.
bugs.fix: Reverted all unintended tracked changes and changed formatting validation to run only on the security pipeline files for this task; future full pre-push validation should avoid all-files formatting hooks in dirty worktrees or pin hygiene hooks to pre-commit only.

bugs.error_message: OSV scanner reported npm vulnerabilities in package-lock.json, cli/package-lock.json, and cli/pnpm-lock.yaml after security pipeline bootstrap
bugs.root_cause: Unused root @artale/pi-procs dependency pulled Pi agent provider dependencies including @mistralai/mistralai; cli lockfiles retained vulnerable transitive test tooling via tdd-guard/tdd-guard-vitest and stale Vite resolution.
bugs.fix: Removed unused @artale/pi-procs and tdd-guard package dependencies, made the Vitest TDD reporter optional, pinned Vite for pnpm, refreshed npm/pnpm lockfiles, rebuilt dist, and verified osv-scanner reports no issues.

bugs.error_message: xtrm-ui shape/summarizer changes did not appear after Pi /reload; structured_return still showed old generic summary and no external tool border.
bugs.root_cause: Project-local Pi package npm:@jaggerxtrm/pi-extensions at .pi/npm/node_modules shadowed the updated global symlink and was still version 0.7.17, so Pi reloaded stale xtrm-ui code.
bugs.fix: Reinstalled the project-local package with npm install --prefix .pi/npm ./packages/pi-extensions so project and global package copies both point at version 0.7.19 code containing the frame patch and structured_return/process summarizers.

bugs.error_message: xtrm-ui process compact summary rendered "0 processs" for zero process list.
bugs.root_cause: Used generic formatLineLabel(count, "process"), which pluralizes by appending s and produces processs instead of processes.
bugs.fix: Use explicit process/processes pluralization in summarizeProcessToolResult list summary.

bugs.error_message: Ctrl+O expanded view did not expand xtrm-ui-compacted external tool results.
bugs.root_cause: tool_result compaction replaced external tool text content with a one-line summary, so renderers had no original text to show when expanded.
bugs.fix: Preserve original tool text as details.xtrmOriginalText and have the external frame renderer switch to that text when ToolExecutionComponent.expanded is true.

bugs.error_message: xtrm-ui external tool border shape still did not render after new code was loaded; compact summaries changed but border patch had no visible effect.
bugs.root_cause: installExternalToolFramePatch used import.meta.resolve("@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent"), which resolved to stale ~/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent instead of the live Pi CLI package under ~/.nvm/.../@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent. The patch modified the wrong ToolExecutionComponent prototype.
bugs.fix: Added resolvePiCodingAgentEntryPath() that prioritizes process.argv[1] realpath and the active Node global @earendil package before @mario fallback, then uses that entry path for assistant-message and tool-execution patches.

bugs.error_message: xtrm-ui external frames showed duplicate tool names and old border labels after reload.
bugs.root_cause: The frame renderer framed the native rendered output for tools with renderers, which included both call header and result body. Also the first prototype patch used an unversioned boolean sentinel, so /reload did not replace the old label-bearing closure.
bugs.fix: Frame result.content summary for compact mode, original text only for expanded mode, and version the ToolExecutionComponent patch so newer /reloads replace the old prototype patch.

bugs.error_message: xtrm-ui external tool rows briefly showed duplicate native call/result content for 1-2 seconds before normalizing to compact summary.
bugs.root_cause: Before tool_result arrived, the frame renderer had no compact result content and fell back to framing native rendered call output, causing transient duplicated display.
bugs.fix: Added pending summary extraction from tool args so compact external frames render one pending line before result content exists.

bugs.error_message: xtrm-ui external frames rendered too wide in compact mode, inconsistent with normal compact density.
bugs.root_cause: frameToolLines used the full available viewport width as the compact content cap, so long one-line summaries produced broad rectangles.
bugs.fix: Added EXTERNAL_TOOL_FRAME_COMPACT_MAX_CONTENT_WIDTH=44 for collapsed frames while preserving full available width when expanded.

bugs.error_message: xtrm-ui compact tool rows had inconsistent left indentation because long subjects/meta wrapped at terminal column 0.
bugs.root_cause: Compact rows allowed long command/path/meta segments, relying on terminal wrapping instead of keeping one compact row with a stable gutter.
bugs.fix: Cap renderToolSummary subject/meta to 34 columns, bash command summaries to 38 columns, and external frame collapsed content to 38 columns.

bugs.error_message: xtrm-ui external framed tools had too much vertical distance between tool calls compared with native compact one-line tool rows.
bugs.root_cause: Collapsed external tools used a three-line box (top/content/bottom), making each tool call take three rows plus normal row spacing.
bugs.fix: Render collapsed external frames as a single-row inline frame with dim cold side borders and underline/overline content; keep the full box for expanded view.

bugs.error_message: xtrm-ui one-line inline external frames rendered as broken/erased text in the terminal.
bugs.root_cause: The pseudo-frame used underline and overline ANSI styling, which is not rendered consistently by Pi/TUI terminal output.
bugs.fix: Removed pseudo-inline frame styling and restored real box drawing for collapsed external tools, tightened to one content line capped at 34 columns.

bugs.error_message: sp-terminal-overlay showed "handle is not defined", opened off-center, and sp ps --follow accumulated repaint frames instead of updating a fixed screen.
bugs.root_cause: Overlay handle variable was scoped inside the custom component factory while onHandle was in options scope; overlay anchor used right-center/72%; stream parser treated ANSI cursor/clear-screen repaint sequences as plain output.
bugs.fix: Moved handle to openTerminalOverlay scope, changed overlay to center/80%, and added simple ANSI CSI terminal emulation for cursor home, clear screen, clear line, and cursor movement.

bugs.error_message: sp-terminal-overlay made Pi crash badly when running streaming overlays.
bugs.root_cause: Likely over-aggressive overlay redraws on every output chunk plus double close path using both handle.close() and done().
bugs.fix: Throttle redraws to at most every 100ms, clear pending render timers on dispose, and remove handle.close() from the component close path so done() owns overlay teardown.

bugs.error_message: TypeError: handle?.requestRender is not a function in sp-terminal-overlay.
bugs.root_cause: Current Pi custom overlay onHandle object does not expose requestRender(), despite docs/examples implying a render handle may exist.
bugs.fix: Removed overlay handle usage entirely and rely only on documented tui.requestRender().

bugs.error_message: sp-terminal-overlay rendered sp feed/sp ps output in plain white instead of preserving original colors.
bugs.root_cause: ANSI CSI SGR color sequences were consumed and discarded by the mini terminal parser.
bugs.fix: Preserve allowlisted numeric CSI SGR sequences for append-only output, reset styling per rendered row, keep cursor/clear controls consumed, and strip SGR in cursor-addressed repaint mode to avoid ANSI-unsafe screen mutation.

bugs.error_message: Pi crashed: Rendered line exceeds terminal width (58 > 56) after xtrm-ui external badge styling.
bugs.root_cause: highlightExternalToolBadge added visible spaces around the badge after the line was already truncated to render width, increasing visible row width by 2.
bugs.fix: Style the matched tool prefix in-place without adding visible padding and bump external tool patch version to v10.
